---
title: "COVID-19 Analysis Report"
author: "Seiryo, Alyssa, Andrew, Hyelim, Chaaeun, Kyria"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r, here-i-am, include = FALSE}
here::i_am(
  "Report.Rmd"
)
```

```{r, load-packages, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(gtsummary)
```

## Table 1 — Patient Characteristics by COVID-19 Status
```{r, table_1}
table_one <- readRDS(here::here("output", "table_one.rds"))
table_one
```

## Figure 1 — COVID-19 Cases by Age Group and Sex
```{r figure1, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
figure1 <- readRDS(here::here("output", "figure1.rds"))
print(figure1)
```

## Figure 2 — Adjusted Odds Ratios for COVID-19 Death
```{r forest-plot, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output", "forest_plot.png"))
```

## Figure 3 — Predicted Probability of Death by Age, Sex, and Hospitalization
```{r marginal-effects, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output", "marginal_effects.png"))
```

## Figure 4 — Odds Ratios for Intubation
```{r kyria-plot, fig.align='center', out.width='100%'}
knitr::include_graphics(here::here("output", "kyria_intubation_plot.png"))
```
